meta_description: kustody connects airport lost & found centers with travelers worldwide. From item registration to international delivery — we handle everything.
hero_title_1: Left something at ICN or GMP?
hero_title_2: We'll send it back to you.
hero_sub: kustody is a recovery and delivery service for lost items at Incheon (ICN) and Gimpo (GMP) airports. Report your item online and we'll handle the rest.
stat_1_label: of lost items go unclaimed at airports
how_sub: No phone calls, no flying back. Recover your lost item entirely from your phone.
how_t1_desc: Submit your airport, flight number, and item details via our online form — anytime, 24/7. No phone calls needed.
how_t2_title: We contact all centers for you
how_t2_desc: kustody reaches out to every relevant lost & found center at your airport simultaneously — airline desks, security, terminal offices — by email on your behalf.
how_t3_desc: Pay for shipping, confirm your address, and we'll deliver it to your door — anywhere in the world.
how_a1_desc: Scan or photograph found items and register them on the platform. The whole process takes under 30 seconds.
how_a2_desc: The system handles matching with claims. Manage everything from a dashboard — no phone calls needed.
how_a3_desc: A kustody courier picks up the item directly from you. No more storage overflow headaches.
feat_1_desc: Airports have multiple lost & found centers — airline desks, security checkpoints, terminal offices. We contact all of them simultaneously, so you don't have to.
feat_2_desc: No phone calls, no hold music, no language barriers. Submit your claim anytime via our online form and we handle the rest by email on your behalf.
feat_3_desc: Domestic courier to international express (DHL, FedEx) — handled in one place. We manage customs paperwork too.
feat_4_desc: Step-by-step updates from submission → confirmation → pickup → delivery → received. No need to follow up yourself.
feat_5_desc: High-value items are insured during transit. Fast compensation in the event of loss or damage on the way to you.
feat_6_desc: Available in English, Korean, Japanese, and Chinese. International travelers can use the platform without language barriers.
cta_desc: Sign up and get notified when we launch — along with exclusive early access perks.
cta_success: ✓ You're on the list. We'll be in touch!
